expectations.text: Scopes analysis to part/act 2 scenes only — does not analyze act 1 scenes
expectations.evidence: Only analyzes act2-sc01, act2-sc02, act2-sc03. No mention of act1 scenes.

expectations.text: Uses coach coaching level behavior — proposes rather than directly applying changes
expectations.evidence: Presents analysis and recommendations, asks 'What would you like to do?' at the end. Does not modify any files.

expectations.text: Mentions saving proposals to working/hone/ directory
expectations.evidence: Does not mention working/hone/ directory at all. The skill says coach mode should save proposals there, but this was not surfaced in the response.

expectations.text: Offers to walk through proposals interactively with the author
expectations.evidence: Offers to 'look more closely at any specific field' but does not explicitly offer the interactive walkthrough described in Step 4 of the skill ('Walk through each flagged field with the author')

expectations.text: Provides a script command that includes --domain briefs, --act 2 (or --part 2), and --coaching coach
expectations.evidence: Provides --domain briefs --scenes act2-sc03 --coaching coach (correct flags but uses --scenes instead of --act 2). Also suggests elaborate command instead of hone for the missing-briefs scenes.
